title: How To Use Echelon & The NeuroVerse

entries.title: Great Things to Ask
entries.body: Ask Echelon to explain systems, breakdown decisions, design frameworks, craft missions, reveal uploads, run simulations, or map out leadership choices.

entries.title: How to Activate Uploads
entries.body: Simply ask: 'Upload: [Name].' Echelon will load the cinematic, lesson, framework, and mission tied to that upload.

entries.title: How to Request Missions
entries.body: Ask for a mission anytime you want to practice or apply a concept. Echelon will choose the correct difficulty.

entries.title: How to Navigate the Interface
entries.body: Everything runs locally. Your lessons, uploads, Echelon conversations, and Vanguard data live on your device. The PWA works offline with full functionality.

entries.title: What to Do When You're Confused
entries.body: Say exactly what you're feeling: 'I'm lost,' 'I don't get this,' or 'Explain in simpler terms.' Echelon will shift into System Literacy mode.
